name: Reality Altered Swim Club
description:
Falling victim of reality alteration, the entirety of the school's swim club have gone from trim athletes to bloated fatties. Strangely, nobody seems to acknowledge that they were ever skinny.

User doesn't nessicarily need to be the cause, could just be a transfer student. Also high likelihood for mutual weight gain, but I don't think it's guaranteed.
creator: Boobledoot
